name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS FiniteSet

VARIABLES participants, votes, decision

TypeOK == /\ participants \in FiniteSet
          /\ votes \in FiniteSet
          /\ decision \in {"Commit", "Abort", "Pending"}

Init == /\ participants = {}
        /\ votes = {}
        /\ decision = "Pending"

Prepare == /\ decision = "Pending"
          /\ votes = {}

VoteYes == /\ decision = "Pending"
          /\ votes' = Append(votes, "Yes")

VoteNo == /\ decision = "Pending"
          /\ votes' = Append(votes, "No")

Commit == /\ decision = "Pending"
          /\ votes = << "Yes", "Yes", ..., "Yes" >>  (* all participants voted yes *)
          /\ decision' = "Commit"

Abort == /\ decision = "Pending"
          /\ votes \in FiniteSet
          /\ decision' = "Abort"

Next == /\ Prepare
        \/ VoteYes
        \/ VoteNo
        \/ Commit
        \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, votes, decision>> ==

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; 0 means free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = 0
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = 0
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![%(i, N) + 1] = 0]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* TypeOK ensures the queue is a sequence of length <= K *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ count \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ count = 0

(* Producer action: enqueues an element if not full *)
Producer == 
  /\ count < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  (* placeholder for actual element *)
  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  /\ count' = count + 1
  /\ head' = head

(* Consumer action: dequeues an element if not empty *)
Consumer == 
  /\ count > 0
  /\ q' = Tail(q)
  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  /\ count' = count - 1
  /\ tail' = tail

(* Next action: either Producer or Consumer *)
Next == 
  \/ Producer
  \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS None, ServerSet

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {None} \/ [server \in ServerSet |-> None]
          /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [s \in ServerSet |-> None]
        /\ state = Follower

RequestVote == /\ state = Candidate
              /\ currentTerm = currentTerm + 1
              /\ votedFor = [votedFor EXCEPT ![self] = self]
              /\ state' = Leader

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
